Questions

FAQ

What Photoshop version do I need?
Splashes PRO works with Photoshop CS6 and all Creative Cloud versions (CC 2015 and later). Compatible with both Mac and Windows.
Can I use these on commercial projects?
Yes — full commercial license included. Use on client work, advertising, packaging, social media, and print without additional fees or royalties.
How do I receive the files after purchase?
Immediately after purchase you receive a download link via email. Download, install the .ABR files in Photoshop, and you're ready within minutes.
What if I'm not satisfied?
Full 30-day money-back guarantee. If not satisfied for any reason, contact us and we'll refund 100% — no questions asked.
What kinds of liquids are included?
Water, chocolate, milk, oil, paint, juice, and more. The pack covers the full spectrum of liquid types used in product and advertising photography — with variety in size, shape, and spray intensity.
